ITEM 3 – LEGAL PROCEEDINGSSee the information set forth in Note 20 Legal Proceedings, which is incorporated here by reference.ITEM 4 – MINE SAFETY DISCLOSURESNot applicable.INFORMATION ABOUT OUR EXECUTIVE OFFICERSInformation regarding each of our executive officers as of February 19, 2026 is set forth below. Executive officers do not have a stated term of office.
